page_content:
Repeat Limit

You are attempting to register for a course which will exceed the repeat credit limit, this is in violation of the Repeat Course Guidelines.

To request permission to exceed the repeat limit, submit an exception to policy request following your academic advising college instructions.

Seats reserved for incoming students

Please review the Seat Management Plan at registrar.umd.edu/registration/register-classes/seat- management-plan for additional information.
